title: Download All - Files View
excerpt: I’d love a ‘Download All’ button or, even better, a way to select multiple files for download at once.

posts.author: DCS_AF (Adam Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love a ‘Download All’ button or, even better, a way to select multiple files for download at once.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @viaan - Welcome to the community! You will be happy to hear that there are several improvements coming to the Files experience, including better annotation and the ability to download all files attached in an Item from the Files column, all at once. It’s currently in internal testing at monday. No firm ETA, but it is coming!
